focus: HARDENING: risks/failure-modes, negative knowledge, and exact patch text for MiniMax-2.7 via cli-opencode

graphEvents.label: Exact patch text for MiniMax follow-on packet
Provider throttling uses fail-fast and explicit retry approval
Large-context cost risk is mitigated by 70 percent active budget and routing table
Variant no-op risk is mitigated by omit-by-default plus ablation promotion rule
Single-path minimax-api exhaustion keeps null fallback and explicit alternate selection
Negative knowledge prevents duplicate rows and MiniMax-specific runtime branches

executor.notes: manual deep-research iteration; no sub-agents dispatched

label: MiniMax hardening must cover RPM/TPM throttling, 204800-token cost runaway, non-interactive hang/timeout behavior, --variant no-op/rejection, and single-path minimax-api exhaustion.

Mitigations should extend existing 114 infrastructure: 70 percent budget discipline, provider pre-flight, mandatory </dev/null, ablation-before-promotion, provider-neutral verification, and registry-driven fail-fast fallback.

Negative knowledge is explicit: do not duplicate MiniMax provider rows, do not add MiniMax-specific runtime branches, do not silently substitute MiniMax, and do not assert --variant mapping without ablation evidence.

Exact patch text is ready for model-profiles.json, per-model-budgets.json, cli-opencode context budget/reference/SKILL docs, cli_prompt_quality_card.md, sk-prompt-small-model SKILL.md, pattern-index.md, and optional MiniMax ablation playbook.
MiniMax stays explicit-route only; cli-opencode default remains opencode-go/deepseek-v4-pro --variant high.
MiniMax omits --variant by default until paired live ablation proves clean exits and meaningful quality gain within latency limits.
Permissions, fallback, and output verification remain provider-neutral or registry-driven; no MiniMax-specific runtime fork is justified.
Current minimax-2.7 registry entry exists with context_length null, quota_pool minimax-api, and fallback_target null; patch should update the existing object rather than add a duplicate.
Current cli-opencode context-budget mirror lists DeepSeek, Kimi, and Qwen but not MiniMax; patch should add MiniMax to that table with a 143360 active budget.
Current sk-prompt-small-model pattern index is link-only and should receive exactly three MiniMax rows, not embedded policy bodies.

summary: Set context_length 204800, keep minimax-api and fallback_target null, update strengths/weaknesses and omit-variant caveat.
Add minimax-2.7 with context_length 204800, max_budget_pct 70, active budget 143360, and tool-round continuity note.
Add active-budget column and MiniMax row; document complete active tool-call/tool-result span preservation.
Document explicit MiniMax route, no default variant, no silent fallback, and task-shape routing table.
Replace MiniMax variant row with omit-by-default policy and add fail-fast/direct-provider routing notes.
Add glm-5.1 and minimax-2.7 to small-model budget list and include compact routing decision table.
Add MiniMax-2.7 direct-provider row and keep sentinel thin with MiniMax included in required model set.
Add context-budget, direct-provider routing, and prompt-quality/variant-ablation rows only.
Add no-variant vs --variant high ablation recipe with three paired runs and pass criteria.

direction: Make MiniMax the cli-opencode default model
reason: MiniMax is targeted for large evidence bundles and quota isolation; DeepSeek remains the default hard-reasoning route and Qwen remains better for narrow bounded edits.

direction: Use --variant high by default on minimax/minimax-2.7
reason: Provider-specific variant behavior is unverified and may be ignored or rejected; omit until ablation proves value.

direction: Add MiniMax-specific permissions, fallback, or output-verification runtime branches
reason: Existing 114 semantics are provider-neutral or registry-driven, and no MiniMax-specific tool target shape has been observed.

direction: Duplicate MiniMax rows in model-profiles.json or pattern-index.md
reason: Phase 001 already added the single active MiniMax executor path; the pattern index should add only three link-only policy rows.
